entity: 2022-23 NBA Finals: Denver Nuggets def. Miami Heat 4-1 (Jokić's first title; first championship in Nuggets franchise history)
notes: Indexed from the DEN side (1610612743). The 4-1 margin matches BBR; MIA's Finals run as an 8-seed remains the deepest 8-seed run to the Finals. Confirmed against the re-derived wl_home/wl_away series wins/losses (per the getTeamPlayoffSeries comment, fact_playoff_series own wins/losses are unreliable).
